name: kast
description: Compiler-backed Kotlin and Gradle task proof for Codex through Kast.

interface.shortDescription: Compiler-backed Kotlin and Gradle task proof.
interface.longDescription: Begin, inspect, and finish Kotlin or Gradle work through Kast's typed task lifecycle.
defaultPrompt: Begin a Kast task and inspect a Kotlin symbol.
Finish this Kotlin change with diagnostics and Gradle proof.
Report the typed blocker preventing Kast task completion.
